message:
feat(config,doctor,graph,show,sync): atomic config writes, graceful missing-dep fallback, JSONL validation improvements

Config (config.rs):
- Replace naive temp-file + rename with TempConfigFileGuard RAII pattern
  that auto-cleans temp files on error via Drop, PID-scoped temp paths
  with collision retry (up to 64 attempts), and explicit sync_all()
  before rename for crash safety
- Preserve original file permissions after atomic rewrite on Unix
- Add write_config_atomically() helper used by both set and delete paths
- Add tests: stale temp file skip, permission preservation on Unix

Doctor (doctor.rs):
- Replace inline JSONL line-by-line parsing with validate_jsonl_issue_records()
  from sync module, which validates records as proper Issue structs (not
  just valid JSON) and reports structured failure details
- Error messages now include field-level validation info (e.g. missing
  title) instead of just "malformed line N"
- Update test assertions for new error message format

Graph (graph.rs):
- Gracefully handle missing dependency targets during graph traversal
  by synthesizing placeholder Issue nodes with [missing issue: ID] title
  and Tombstone status, instead of returning IssueNotFound error
- Add test: collect_single_graph_preserves_missing_dependent_placeholder

Show (show.rs):
- Make dependency_metadata_from_jsonl() infallible (returns placeholder
  tuple instead of Result) for missing dependencies, matching the graph
  command's graceful degradation pattern
- Add test: build_issue_details_from_jsonl_preserves_missing_dependency

Sync (sync.rs, mod.rs):
- Add validate_jsonl_issue_records() public function for reuse by doctor
- Expanded sync validation and preflight checking

Other:
- Update beads issues JSONL with latest status changes
- Cargo.lock dependency version updates
- defer.rs, sqlite.rs: minor formatting adjustments
- bench_real_datasets.rs, e2e_basic_lifecycle.rs: test improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
